Once upon a time, there was a small frog named Lola. Lola lived in a small pond with his family. They liked to play all day long. One day, Lola saw a frog and decided to jump over it. The frog said, "Hi, Lola! Can I join in?"
Lola said, "Yes, you can join me in the fun!" The frog jumped over the pond and started to jump over the frog. The frog said, "Hi, Lola! My name is Bobo. Let's play together and have fun!"
Lola was very happy. She jumped over the pond and swam with her family. She played with her friends and they all played together. From that day on, Lola always played with her friends and their new friend, and they all lived happily ever after.

The big tree said, "I'm playing here so much. I am very hungry. Can I eat some cheese?" Spot looked at the yummy cheese and said, "Yes, you can spend my nap." They both smiled and played together.

name: Pia
story:
Once upon a time, there was a small mouse named Pia. Pia loved to play with his big, red ball. One day, Pia saw a big cave. She thought it was very fun to play in the cave.
Pia had a friend named Bella. Bella said, "Let's play hide and seek!" Pia agreed, and she started to look for the cave. Bella looked under the cave and behind the trees.
As she looked, Pia found a little bug named Bella. Bella was sad because she lost her ball. Pia said, "Don't be sad, Bella! I will help you find your ball." Bella was happy and said, "Thank you, Pia. I will help you find your ball." Bella was happy and they became friends. From that day on, Pia and Bella played together every day. And they lived happily ever after.
